0: This was super easy to install on my 8 year old's tablet and is holding up great. Fits perfect. Makes it easier to hold the remote. The battery life sucks. It only lasts about 2 hours before it needs a recharge and the recharge is SLOW.
1: This is a great recorder. It is easy to use and it picks up voices from a pocket in my purse. You can file the voice recordings into different folders and the recorder is small so it is not obvious. Used it to backup my hard drive so far.
2: Nord is supposed to be OnePlus' value brand, and the price reflects that. They sound better to me than other wireless earbuds at this price range. They aren't as well made as the standard Oneplus buds, they aren't bad, especially for the money.
3: Perfect in every way. Some stickers were really nice but for the most part they were mediocre at best. Do not hold as much as I would have through, but work well if you need to store stuff.
4: This USB-C hub worked well with my Samsung Galaxy Tab S6. It does not fit in any of the USB chargers that I own. No USB power pass-through to charge a mobile device while using the hub.
